foods.name: Margherita Pizza
preparation: Prepare pizza dough with flour, yeast, water, salt, and olive oil
Knead dough until smooth and let it rise for 1-2 hours
Punch down dough and shape into a round base
Preheat oven or pizza stone to a high temperature
Spread a thin layer of San Marzano tomato sauce over the base
Tear fresh mozzarella into pieces and distribute evenly
Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil
Bake until crust is golden and cheese is bubbling
Remove from oven and garnish with fresh basil leaves
Slice and serve immediately while hot

foods.name: Cheeseburger
preparation: Shape ground beef into evenly sized patties
Season patties with salt and pepper on both sides
Preheat grill or skillet to medium-high heat
Sear patties for 3-4 minutes per side to desired doneness
Place a cheese slice on each patty to melt during last minute
Toast burger buns lightly on the grill
Spread condiments such as ketchup, mustard, and mayo on buns
Layer lettuce, tomato, and onion on the bottom bun
Place the cheesy patty on top of the vegetables
Cover with top bun and serve with fries

foods.name: Sushi Platter
preparation: Rinse sushi rice thoroughly until water runs clear
Cook rice and season with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt
Let seasoned rice cool to room temperature
Slice fresh fish such as tuna and salmon into thin pieces
Prepare nori sheets and other fillings like cucumber and avocado
Lay nori on a bamboo mat and spread rice evenly
Add fillings and roll tightly using the bamboo mat
Slice rolls into bite-sized pieces with a sharp wet knife
Arrange rolls and nigiri pieces neatly on a platter
Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and pickled ginger

foods.name: Caesar Salad
preparation: Wash and dry romaine lettuce leaves thoroughly
Tear or chop lettuce into bite-sized pieces
Prepare Caesar dressing with garlic, anchovy, lemon, and parmesan
Cube bread and toast with olive oil to make croutons
Toss lettuce with the prepared Caesar dressing
Grate fresh parmesan cheese over the salad
Add the freshly made croutons on top
Season with cracked black pepper
Optionally add grilled chicken strips
Toss gently and serve immediately

foods.name: Pad Thai
preparation: Soak rice noodles in warm water until softened
Prepare pad thai sauce with tamarind, fish sauce, and palm sugar
Heat oil in a wok over high heat
Stir-fry shrimp or chicken until nearly cooked through
Push protein aside and scramble an egg in the wok
Add drained noodles and pour in the prepared sauce
Toss everything together until noodles are evenly coated
Add bean sprouts and chopped green onions
Stir-fry briefly until vegetables are just tender
Plate and garnish with crushed peanuts and lime wedges

foods.name: Chicken Tacos
preparation: Marinate chicken pieces with lime juice and taco spices
Heat a skillet or grill over medium-high heat
Cook marinated chicken until fully cooked and slightly charred
Let cooked chicken rest, then slice or shred it
Warm corn or flour tortillas on a dry skillet
Dice fresh tomatoes, onions, and cilantro for topping
Shred lettuce and prepare a squeeze of lime
Fill each tortilla with the sliced chicken
Top with fresh salsa, onions, cilantro, and lettuce
Serve with lime wedges and hot sauce on the side

foods.name: BBQ Ribs
preparation: Remove the silver skin membrane from the rack of ribs
Rub ribs generously with a dry spice rub
Let ribs marinate in the refrigerator for a few hours
Preheat smoker or oven to a low, steady temperature
Slow-cook ribs for several hours until tender
Baste ribs periodically with BBQ sauce while cooking
Increase heat briefly to caramelize the sauce
Check for tenderness by testing if meat pulls from the bone
Rest the ribs for a few minutes after cooking
Slice between the bones and serve with extra BBQ sauce

foods.name: Pasta Carbonara
preparation: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil
Cook spaghetti until al dente
Fry diced pancetta or guanciale until crispy
Whisk eggs with grated parmesan and black pepper
Reserve some pasta water before draining the spaghetti
Drain pasta and add it directly to the pancetta pan
Remove pan from heat to avoid scrambling the eggs
Quickly stir in the egg and cheese mixture
Add reserved pasta water gradually to create a creamy sauce
Plate and finish with extra parmesan and black pepper

foods.name: Greek Salad
preparation: Wash and chop cucumbers, tomatoes, and green peppers
Slice red onion thinly
Combine chopped vegetables in a large bowl
Add whole Kalamata olives to the mix
Cut feta cheese into cubes or a large slab
Drizzle extra virgin olive oil generously over the salad
Season with dried oregano, salt, and pepper
Add a splash of red wine vinegar
Toss vegetables gently while keeping feta intact
Serve chilled with crusty bread on the side

foods.name: Ramen Bowl
preparation: Prepare a rich broth using pork or chicken bones simmered for hours
Strain the broth and season with soy sauce and miso
Cook ramen noodles in boiling water until springy
Soft-boil eggs and marinate them in a soy-based sauce
Slice chashu pork or prepared protein thinly
Chop green onions and prepare nori sheets
Warm serving bowls before assembling
Ladle hot broth into each bowl
Add cooked noodles into the broth
Top with sliced pork, marinated egg, nori, and green onions

foods.name: Fish and Chips
preparation: Cut potatoes into thick chip-sized strips
Par-boil or par-fry chips until slightly tender
Prepare a beer batter with flour, baking powder, and cold beer
Pat fish fillets dry and season with salt
Dip fish fillets into the beer batter to coat evenly
Heat oil in a deep fryer to the correct temperature
Fry the battered fish until golden and crispy
Fry the par-cooked chips a second time until crisp
Drain both fish and chips on paper towels
Serve hot with tartar sauce, malt vinegar, and lemon wedges

foods.name: Butter Chicken
preparation: Marinate chicken pieces in yogurt and spices
Grill or pan-sear the marinated chicken until charred
Saute onions, ginger, and garlic until fragrant
Add tomato puree and cook until the oil separates
Blend the tomato mixture into a smooth gravy
Return the mixture to the pan and add cream
Stir in butter and garam masala
Add the cooked chicken pieces into the gravy
Simmer until chicken absorbs the flavors of the sauce
Garnish with fresh cream and cilantro before serving

foods.name: Beef Steak
preparation: Bring the steak to room temperature before cooking
Pat the steak dry and season generously with salt and pepper
Heat a cast iron skillet until very hot
Add oil and sear the steak for a few minutes per side
Add butter, garlic, and herbs to the pan
Baste the steak continuously with the melted butter
Check internal temperature for desired doneness
Remove steak from the pan and let it rest
Slice against the grain
Plate and drizzle with the pan juices before serving

foods.name: Chicken Wings
preparation: Pat chicken wings dry with paper towels
Season wings with salt, pepper, and baking powder
Arrange wings on a wire rack over a baking sheet
Bake or fry wings until crispy and fully cooked
Prepare a sauce such as buffalo, BBQ, or honey garlic
Melt butter and mix it into the chosen sauce
Toss the hot cooked wings in the sauce
Ensure wings are evenly coated
Plate the wings and garnish with chopped herbs
Serve with celery sticks and a dipping sauce

foods.name: Pho Soup
preparation: Char onion and ginger over an open flame
Simmer beef bones with charred aromatics for hours
Skim impurities from the broth periodically
Season broth with fish sauce, star anise, and cinnamon
Strain the broth until clear
Soak rice noodles until soft and pliable
Thinly slice raw beef for topping
Blanch noodles quickly in hot water
Assemble noodles and raw beef slices in a bowl
Pour hot broth over the top and garnish with herbs and lime

foods.name: Pepperoni Pizza
preparation: Prepare and proof pizza dough until doubled in size
Roll or stretch the dough into a round base
Preheat oven or pizza stone to a high temperature
Spread tomato sauce evenly over the dough
Sprinkle a generous layer of shredded mozzarella
Arrange pepperoni slices evenly across the top
Drizzle lightly with olive oil
Bake until the crust is golden and cheese is bubbly
Remove from oven and let it rest briefly
Slice into wedges and serve hot

foods.name: Falafel Wrap
preparation: Soak dried chickpeas overnight
Blend chickpeas with herbs, garlic, and spices
Shape the mixture into small balls or patties
Chill falafel mixture briefly to firm up
Heat oil for frying in a deep pan
Fry falafel balls until golden and crispy outside
Warm flatbread or pita on a skillet
Spread hummus or tahini sauce on the bread
Layer falafel with lettuce, tomato, and pickles
Roll the wrap tightly and serve immediately

foods.name: Fried Rice
preparation: Cook rice ahead of time and let it cool completely
Heat oil in a wok over high heat
Scramble eggs and set them aside
Stir-fry diced vegetables such as carrots and peas
Add diced protein like chicken or shrimp if desired
Add the cooled rice to the wok
Break up any clumps of rice while stir-frying
Season with soy sauce and a dash of sesame oil
Fold in the scrambled eggs and green onions
Toss everything together and serve hot

foods.name: Lobster Roll
preparation: Boil or steam lobster until fully cooked
Let lobster cool before removing the meat from the shell
Chop the lobster meat into bite-sized chunks
Mix lobster meat with mayonnaise and a squeeze of lemon
Season the mixture with salt and pepper
Add finely diced celery for crunch
Split and butter top-loading hot dog buns
Toast the buns on a griddle until golden
Fill the toasted buns generously with the lobster mixture
Garnish with chives and serve immediately

foods.name: Croissant
preparation: Prepare a yeasted dough and let it rest in the fridge
Flatten butter into a block for laminating
Encase the butter block within the dough
Roll and fold the dough multiple times to create layers
Chill the dough between each folding step
Roll the laminated dough out into a large rectangle
Cut the dough into triangles
Roll each triangle into a crescent shape
Let shaped croissants proof until puffy
Bake until golden brown and flaky, then cool slightly before serving

foods.name: Burrito Bowl
preparation: Cook rice and season with lime juice and cilantro
Season and cook protein such as chicken or beef
Prepare black beans with cumin and garlic
Dice fresh tomatoes and onions for salsa
Slice avocado or prepare guacamole
Shred lettuce and grate cheese
Layer rice as the base in a serving bowl
Add beans and cooked protein on top
Arrange salsa, guacamole, lettuce, and cheese around the bowl
Finish with a dollop of sour cream and serve

foods.name: Tom Yum Soup
preparation: Bring water or stock to a boil in a pot
Add lemongrass, galangal, and kaffir lime leaves
Simmer aromatics to infuse the broth
Add mushrooms and simmer until tender
Add shrimp or chicken to the broth
Cook protein until just done
Season broth with fish sauce and lime juice
Stir in Thai chili paste for heat and color
Adjust seasoning with sugar for balance
Ladle into bowls and garnish with cilantro before serving

foods.name: Pancakes
preparation: Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt
In a separate bowl, mix milk, egg, and melted butter
Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed
Let the batter rest for a few minutes
Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat
Lightly grease the pan with butter
Pour batter onto the pan to form rounds
Cook until bubbles form on the surface, then flip
Cook the other side until golden brown
Stack pancakes and serve with syrup and butter

foods.name: Beef Tacos
preparation: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium heat
Drain excess fat from the cooked beef
Season the beef with taco spices and a splash of water
Simmer until the sauce thickens slightly
Warm taco shells or tortillas
Shred lettuce and dice tomatoes
Grate cheese for topping
Fill each shell with the seasoned beef
Top with lettuce, tomato, and cheese
Serve with salsa and sour cream on the side

foods.name: Salmon Sashimi
preparation: Select sushi-grade fresh salmon
Chill the salmon thoroughly before slicing
Sharpen a sashimi knife for clean cuts
Trim any skin or bones from the fillet
Slice the salmon against the grain into thin pieces
Wipe the knife clean between each cut
Arrange the slices neatly on a chilled plate
Garnish with shredded daikon radish
Add a small mound of wasabi
Serve with soy sauce for dipping

foods.name: Chicken Biryani
preparation: Marinate chicken in yogurt and biryani spices
Soak basmati rice in water for 30 minutes
Par-boil the rice with whole spices until partially cooked
Cook the marinated chicken until nearly done
Fry sliced onions until golden and crispy
Layer the partially cooked rice over the chicken
Sprinkle fried onions, saffron milk, and fresh herbs between layers
Cover the pot tightly to seal in steam
Cook on low heat using the dum method until fully done
Gently fluff and mix before serving hot

foods.name: Avocado Toast
preparation: Toast slices of bread until golden and crisp
Cut a ripe avocado in half and remove the pit
Scoop the avocado flesh into a bowl
Mash the avocado with a fork
Season the mashed avocado with salt, pepper, and lemon juice
Spread the mashed avocado evenly over the toast
Add optional toppings like cherry tomatoes or feta
Sprinkle with red chili flakes for heat
Drizzle a little olive oil over the top
Serve immediately while the toast is warm

foods.name: Spring Rolls
preparation: Soften rice paper wrappers in warm water
Prepare fillings such as shrimp, herbs, and vermicelli noodles
Cook and cool the shrimp before slicing in half
Lay the softened rice paper flat on a clean surface
Arrange lettuce and herbs on the lower third of the wrapper
Add noodles and shrimp on top of the herbs
Fold the sides of the wrapper inward
Roll tightly from the bottom to seal the filling
Repeat with remaining wrappers and fillings
Serve fresh with peanut or hoisin dipping sauce

foods.name: Chicken Parmesan
preparation: Pound chicken breasts to an even thickness
Season chicken with salt and pepper
Dredge chicken in flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs
Heat oil in a skillet for pan-frying
Fry breaded chicken until golden and crisp on both sides
Spread marinara sauce in a baking dish
Place the fried chicken on top of the sauce
Top chicken with more marinara and shredded mozzarella
Bake until the cheese is melted and bubbly
Garnish with fresh basil and serve with pasta
